items.name: Panini
items.description: Enjoy authentic Italian paninis, made with high-quality meats, cheese, and fresh local produce.
items.simplified_description: Italian sandwiches made with good meats, cheese, and fresh ingredients.

items.name: Pasta
items.description: Explore the flavors of Italy with our pasta selection. Our classic dishes are made with premium ingredients for the perfect Italian food experience.
items.simplified_description: A variety of Italian pasta dishes made with high-quality ingredients.

items.name: Salad
items.description: A mix of fresh ingredients, topped with delicious dressings for a refreshing dish.
items.simplified_description: A fresh vegetable dish with tasty dressings.

items.name: Soup
items.description: Homemade soup made daily using fresh ingredients.
items.simplified_description: Freshly made soup prepared every day.

items.name: Custom Platters
items.description: We offer custom platters made locally in Calgary with premium meats, artisan cheeses, and fresh, house-made Italian ingredients.
items.simplified_description: Personalized trays of high-quality meats and cheeses made in Calgary.

items.name: Custom Gift Baskets
items.description: Each basket from The Italian Store is a customized collection of high-quality products, tailored to fit every taste and occasion.
items.simplified_description: Personalized baskets filled with quality products for any occasion.

items.name: Assorted Italian Ingredients
items.description: Choose from an extensive selection of premium items to create the perfect custom basket.
items.simplified_description: A variety of high-quality Italian ingredients for custom baskets.

items.name: Delivery Service
items.description: We deliver our gift baskets directly to your doorstep or a specified location within Calgary.
items.simplified_description: Delivery of gift baskets to your home or chosen location in Calgary.
